title: KONI — Koiné Online Nexus of Integration
description: KONI (Koiné Online Nexus of Integration) is a lightweight workstation for classical philologists and digital humanists. It builds a machine-readable, Linked-Open-Data index of the Thesaurus Linguae Graecae (TLG) canon from public sources, serves a zero-dependency web reader for openly licensed Greek texts, and runs a two-phase text-reuse engine ("Flame") tuned for inflected, dialectally varied Greek. This record archives the source code; the canon index it builds is TLG-derived and is not redistributed (it is built locally from public sources). The openly licensed cross-reference dataset produced by KONI is deposited separately (see Related identifiers).
